code: import{BarChart,Bar,XAxis,YAxis,CartesianGrid,Tooltip,Legend,ResponsiveContainer}from"recharts";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export function TrendChart(_ref){let{scans}=_ref;const data=scans.filter(s=>s.status==="completed"&&s.summary).slice(0,10).reverse().map((s,i)=>({name:"#".concat(i+1),CRITICAL:s.summary.CRITICAL||0,HIGH:s.summary.HIGH||0,MEDIUM:s.summary.MEDIUM||0,LOW:s.summary.LOW||0}));const card={background:"#1e293b",borderRadius:12,padding:20,border:"1px solid #334155",marginTop:24};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:card,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{fontSize:14,fontWeight:600,color:"#38bdf8",marginBottom:16},children:"\uD83D\uDCC8 Findings Trend (last 10 scans)"}),data.length===0?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{color:"#64748b",textAlign:"center",padding:20},children:"No completed scans yet"}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ResponsiveContainer,{width:"100%",height:200,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(BarChart,{data:data,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CartesianGrid,{strokeDasharray:"3 3",stroke:"#334155"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(XAxis,{dataKey:"name",stroke:"#64748b",fontSize:11}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(YAxis,{stroke:"#64748b",fontSize:11}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Tooltip,{contentStyle:{background:"#0f172a",border:"1px solid #334155",color:"#e2e8f0"}}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Legend,{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Bar,{dataKey:"CRITICAL",fill:"#ef4444",radius:[3,3,0,0]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Bar,{dataKey:"HIGH",fill:"#f97316",radius:[3,3,0,0]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Bar,{dataKey:"MEDIUM",fill:"#eab308",radius:[3,3,0,0]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Bar,{dataKey:"LOW",fill:"#22c55e",radius:[3,3,0,0]})]})})]});}export default TrendChart;
